basic_details.job_title: A&N Union Territory Health Mission Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Cold Chain Assistant, Lab Technician and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Andaman & Nicobar Union Territory Health Mission
basic_details.post_name: Cold Chain Assistant (Immunization), Counsellor (DRTB), Lab Technician, Clinical Psychologist
basic_details.short_information: Andaman & Nicobar Union Territory Health Mission has released the official Health Mission Recruitment 2026 notification for multiple contract-based posts with a total of 04 vacancies. The recruitment includes positions such as Cold Chain Assistant (Immunization), Counsellor (DRTB), Lab Technician, and Clinical Psychologist.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 60 years for all posts.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor's Degree in Science or ITI in R/AC TRAT and PGDCA, Bachelor's Degree in Social Work / Sociology / Psychology, Diploma in Medical Laboratory Technology, M. Phil. in Clinical Psychology or M.A. Psychology
qualification.details: Cold Chain Assistant (Immunization): Bachelor's Degree in Science, knowledge of logistic and supply management or public health or ITI in R/AC TRAT and PGDCA. At least 2-3 years of experience in cold chain management, logistics, or a related field. Strong technical knowledge of cold chain management, including equipment maintenance and temperature monitoring. Excellent communication and interpersonal skills. Counsellor (DRTB): Bachelors (or equivalent) Degree in Social Work / Sociology / Psychology. Preferential: Masters Degree / PG Diploma in Social Work / Sociology / Psychology. Experience in NTEP or worked as Counsellor. Basic knowledge of computers. Lab Technician: Intermediate (10+2) and Diploma or certified course in Medical Laboratory Technology or equivalent. Preferential: One year experience in NTEP or Sputum smear microscopy. Candidates with Higher qualification (for example Graduates) shall be preferred. Clinical Psychologist: M. Phil. in Clinical Psychology from RCI recognized Institutions or University / M.A. Psychology (NET Qualified can also apply). Desirable: Psychological Assessment / Neuropsychological Assessment.

salary_details.details: Cold Chain Assistant (Immunization): Rs. 25,000/- Per Month Counsellor (DRTB): Rs. 16,328/- Per Month Lab Technician: Rs. 21,632/- Per Month Clinical Psychologist: Rs. 30,000/- Per Month

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for A&N Union Territory Health Mission Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website:andamannicobar.gov.in/ .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 27-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: A&N Union Territory Health Mission Recruitment 2026 - Vacancy Details
A&N Union Territory Health Mission Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Cold Chain Assistant (Immunization): Bachelor's Degree in Science, knowledge of logistic and supply management or public health or ITI in R/AC TRAT and PGDCA. At least 2-3 years of experience in cold chain management, logistics, or a related field. Strong technical knowledge of cold chain management, including equipment maintenance and temperature monitoring. Excellent communication and interpersonal skills. Counsellor (DRTB): Bachelors (or equivalent) Degree in Social Work / Sociology / Psychology. Preferential: Masters Degree / PG Diploma in Social Work / Sociology / Psychology. Experience in NTEP or worked as Counsellor. Basic knowledge of computers. Lab Technician: Intermediate (10+2) and Diploma or certified course in Medical Laboratory Technology or equivalent. Preferential: One year experience in NTEP or Sputum smear microscopy. Candidates with Higher qualification (for example Graduates) shall be preferred. Clinical Psychologist: M. Phil. in Clinical Psychology from RCI recognized Institutions or University / M.A. Psychology (NET Qualified can also apply). Desirable: Psychological Assessment / Neuropsychological Assessment.

content_sections.heading: A&N Union Territory Health Mission Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for A&N Union Territory Health Mission Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website:andamannicobar.gov.in/ . Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 27-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: A&N Union Territory Health Mission Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the A&N Union Territory Health Mission recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application form is 27th July 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in this recruitment?
faq.answer: There are a total of 4 vacancies announced by the Andaman & Nicobar Union Territory Health Mission for various posts including Cold Chain Assistant, Counsellor, Lab Technician, and Clinical Psychologist.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the application form and submit it via post or as specified in the notification.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for the candidates applying for these posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all the posts is 60 years as of 20th July 2026.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Clinical Psychologist post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Clinical Psychologist post will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 30,000/-.

faq.question: Q6. Are there any application fees for the A&N Union Territory Health Mission recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process will be based on merit, followed by an interview and document verification.

faq.question: Q8. What are the minimum qualifications required for the Lab Technician post?
faq.answer: For the Lab Technician post, candidates need to have completed Intermediate (10+2) and possess a Diploma or certified course in Medical Laboratory Technology or equivalent.

faq.question: Q9. Does the A&N Union Territory Health Mission offer contract jobs?
faq.answer: Yes, the job type for this recruitment is contract, as per the official notification released by the organization.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of the Andaman & Nicobar Union Territory Health Mission. Links are provided in the 'Important Links' section of this article.
